summary: Task 6 wires `InitDiagnostics` into `DefaultModelRegistry.initialize` exactly per spec: one `onInitStart` after `releaseEngine` and before the first `awaitInitialize` (lines 242-245), one `onInitEnd(true)` on each of the GPU success arm (258) and CPU-fallback success arm (274 — explicitly NOT a second start, comment cites Decision 8), one `onInitEnd(false)` on the full-failure arm after `errorLog.e` and `updateEntry { Failed }` (280), and zero `onInitEnd` on the `CancellationException` arm (282-288, comment cites Decision 8 InProgress invariant). `availMem` is read via the already-injected `@ApplicationContext context` per Decision 9 — no new DI seam. Constructor change is minimal (one extra `@Inject` parameter), `RecordingInitDiagnostics` is a clean test fake with positive call-order assertions, all five TDD anchor tests are present, and `ModelRegistryActiveModelTest` got the one-line ctor update. Module boundary held — no `:app` imports in `:core-runtime/src/main`. All comments lead with WHY and reference Decisions 8/9 by name. No critical or major findings.
